text: Leading By Example | Visa We make the world better, together Connecting millions of people every day By connecting more than 4 billion account holders to over 130 million merchants, ~14,500 financial institutions and governments in more than 200 countries and territories,¹ we help level the playing field for traditionally disadvantaged groups. Tech partnerships that help break down barriers New technologies help more people participate in the economy today. That’s why we partner with fintechs of all sizes to enable the digital payment solutions of tomorrow. Our mission is to help make the world a better place We’ve committed to sustainable efforts, responsible operations and equality in the workplace. Every single day. The people behind the payments Most consumers don’t realise that Visa is a tech company, and innovation is at the core of what we do. As the world’s largest electronic payments network, we enable how people move money around the world. As the world’s largest electronic payments network, we enable how people move money around the world. Our people are our biggest asset. We place a premium on leadership and are ensuring our 20,000+ employees have the resources they need to be successful. — Al Kelly , Executive Chairman Doing more for sustainability We recognise the importance of protecting our planet, and we are working to drive sustainability in our own operations and in commerce overall. See how we preserve the planet 2023’s World’s Most Ethical Company List Ethisphere, an organisation dedicated to advancing the standards of ethical business practices, recognised Visa with its honour for the 11th year in a row. Here is the proof – Honourees – World’s Most Ethical Companies Diversity and inclusion efforts We’re committed to building and maintaining an inclusive and diverse workplace. $14 million raised by employees for charity In 2020, nearly 6000 Visa employees donated $5.5 million to 4600 charities worldwide, with $8.5 million in matching gifts by Visa.⁴ See more initiatives Join a team that believes in making a difference around the world.
